  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which primary focus should this review prioritize: (A) technical content—conceptual framing and logical consistency (R1.1–R1.2), (B) language and clarity editing (R1.6), (C) section-level structure and flow (R1.5), or (D) positioning/novelty vs prior work (R1.4)? You may choose one or more.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The section states the problem setup and claims a central contribution, so assessing the clarity of the core thesis and framing is central.",
    "R1.2": "The two-level control description, constraints, and objective require checking internal logical consistency of the argument chain.",
    "R1.6": "A typical section review often targets sentence-level clarity, precision, and concision without altering the higher-level structure.",
    "RX.1": "Given the ambiguous request, explicitly stating uncertainties and limits of the review focus is essential.",
    "RX.2": "The review should avoid overstating what the section supports or implying results not evidenced in the provided text.",
    "RX.3": "The work must stay confined to reviewing this section only, without expanding scope into unrelated content or execution.",
    "RX.4": "Care is needed to avoid recommendations that could inadvertently encourage misleading or risky claims about methods or performance.",
    "RX.5": "Any assessments should be traceable to specific statements in the provided section to maintain provenance."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which primary focus should this review prioritize: (A) technical content—conceptual framing and logical consistency (R1.1–R1.2), (B) language and clarity editing (R1.6), (C) section-level structure and flow (R1.5), or (D) positioning/novelty vs prior work (R1.4)? You may choose one or more.

rationale.R1.1: The section states the problem setup and claims a central contribution, so assessing the clarity of the core thesis and framing is central.
rationale.R1.2: The two-level control description, constraints, and objective require checking internal logical consistency of the argument chain.
rationale.R1.6: A typical section review often targets sentence-level clarity, precision, and concision without altering the higher-level structure.
rationale.RX.1: Given the ambiguous request, explicitly stating uncertainties and limits of the review focus is essential.
rationale.RX.2: The review should avoid overstating what the section supports or implying results not evidenced in the provided text.
rationale.RX.3: The work must stay confined to reviewing this section only, without expanding scope into unrelated content or execution.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid recommendations that could inadvertently encourage misleading or risky claims about methods or performance.
rationale.RX.5: Any assessments should be traceable to specific statements in the provided section to maintain provenance.
